strip.openTitle: Open your Earning, XP, Currency, ranks, cosmetics

dashboard.empty: No earning record yet, earn XP from chat or forums to start.

overview.noCharacterPools: No character pools yet. Post as a character in chat to start one.

zeroState.title: Welcome to your Earning.
zeroState.intro: Earning is the long-term reward layer for being part of the community. Two counters grow side by side as you participate:
zeroState.xpBullet: <0>XP</0> grows your <2>rank</2>, the sigil shown next to your name in chat and the userlist.
zeroState.currencyBullet: <0>Currency</0> goes into your wallet, ready to spend on name styles, avatar borders, and other cosmetics here in the dashboard.
zeroState.earnFrom: You earn both at the same time from:
zeroState.sourceChat: Chat messages (long enough to be meaningful, a single "ok" doesn't count)
zeroState.sourcePresence: Being active in a room (we award a small amount every few minutes you're present)
zeroState.outro: Just chat normally. You'll see your first rank within a session or two. The Help modal's Earning guide has the full picture if you want more.

settings.privacyIntro: Rank, tier, and sigil are always visible, rank is a public identity tag. XP and Currency totals are hidden independently when their respective toggle is on.
settings.hideCurrency: Hide my Currency from other users
settings.hideCurrencyDesc: Other people see "private" instead of your Currency total in <0>/currency {{name}}</0> and on your public profile.
settings.hideXp: Hide my XP from other users
settings.hideXpDesc: Other people see "private" instead of your XP total on your profile and in <0>/exp {{name}}</0>.
settings.cmdCurrencyUser: <0>/currency [user]</0>, look up another user's Currency (honors their privacy)
settings.cmdCurrencySend: <0>/currency send [target] [amount]</0>, transfer Currency to a user or character
settings.cmdExp: <0>/exp</0>, show your XP, rank, and any borders you can buy

stub.coming: Coming in {{phase}}. The data plumbing is already in place, only the buy / equip UI is pending.

styles.buyConfirm: Buy this style for {{cost}} Currency from {{who}}'s pool?
styles.noneOwned: You don't own any styles yet. Switch to "Available" to browse.
styles.allOwned: You own every available style. Nice.

borders.buyRankConfirm: Buy this rank's border from {{who}}'s pool?
borders.noneOwned: You don't own any borders yet.
borders.noneAvailable: No borders available to purchase right now. Climb the ladder to unlock more.

cosmetics.lurkingToggleTitle: Hide your typing status from peers (admins still see it)
cosmetics.lurkingActive: You're hidden from peers' "is typing…" indicators. Admins still see you for moderation.
cosmetics.visitorsOwnedCopy: Show your visitor count on your profile and read the member / external breakdown.
cosmetics.marqueeOwnedCopy: Configure your rotating quotes. Up to 10 lines, Markdown supported.
cosmetics.buyDisabledTitle: Not enough Currency, or a purchase is already in flight
cosmetics.configureTitle: Open Edit Profile and jump to the Flair tab where this is configured.
cosmetics.bannerManageHint: Manage from Profile » Appearance to see a full-size preview.
cosmetics.typingHelp: Up to {{max}} characters. Replaces the default "is typing…" suffix when you're the only person typing. Admins can clear abusive phrases.
cosmetics.presenceHelp: Use <0>{name}</0> for your name. Up to {{max}} characters each. Admins can clear abusive templates.
cosmetics.presenceHelpRoom: Use <0>{name}</0> for your name and <1>{room}</1> for the room name. Up to {{max}} characters each. Admins can clear abusive templates.

transitions.disabled: Room transitions have been disabled for your role by an admin.
transitions.intro: A flourish that plays for YOU when you switch rooms, only you see it. Equipped per identity ({{identity}}). Off = instant. Hit Preview on any rite to watch it play right on its card.

items.switchOtherCharacter: Switch identity via /char to view another character's inventory.
items.switchToCharacter: Switch to a character via /char to view that character's inventory.
items.emptyInventory: {{name}} doesn't hold any items yet. Switch to "Shop" to browse or wait for someone to /give you one.
items.noMatchCategory: No items match "{{query}}" in this category.
items.noneInCategoryNow: No items in this category right now.
items.collectionHeader: Pin up to 10 items from <0>{{name}}</0>'s inventory to feature on their profile. Pets pin to the separate Pet Collection (5 slots), switch to the Pets tab to manage those.
items.collectionEmptyInventory: No items in this identity's inventory to pin. Visit the Shop tab or wait for someone to /give you one.
items.collectionPickerEmpty: No non-pet items in this inventory. Pets pin to the Pets tab instead.
items.petsHeader: Pin up to 5 pets from <0>{{name}}</0>'s inventory to feature on their profile. Non-pet items live in the Collection tab. Give each pet a nickname after pinning to show "Whiskers (Maine Coon)" on the profile.
items.petsEmptyInventory: No items in this identity's inventory yet. Visit the Shop tab and look for the Pets category.
items.petsPickerEmpty: No pets in this inventory. Buy one from the Shop's Pets category to pin it here.
items.tip: Tip: items move between identities only via the <1>/give</1> command. <3>/throw</3> and <5>/drop</5> consume the item for flavor, nothing transfers.
